projects.name: LazyIntern – AI-Powered Internship Automation Platform
projects.description: Production-ready end-to-end automation platform that discovers, scores, and applies to internships 24/7 using a 3-tier scraping strategy (HTTP → Playwright → Firecrawl) across 60+ curated sources including YC, Wellfound, LinkedIn, and AI labs.
projects.impact: Multi-gate filtering pipeline (keyword pre-score → MX+SMTP validation → weighted full score) eliminates 90% of low-quality leads before API spend; Groq system prompt caching cuts AI costs by 90%; 10-table DB schema with retry queues, quarantine re-evaluation, and a Next.js real-time analytics dashboard

projects.name: BrainRot Learning (Insta AI Agent)
projects.description: Automated Instagram Reels creation pipeline transforming natural language prompts into viral educational content via multi-agent AI orchestration.
projects.impact: End-to-end pipeline covering script generation, voiceover synthesis, subtitle sync, and auto-posting with zero-code UI

projects.name: Confession ADG
projects.description: Dual-interface anonymous confession platform with public submission and password-protected admin moderation.
projects.impact: Handled 100-200 concurrent users during peak load with zero downtime

projects.name: MailMind – AI Email Assistant
projects.description: Privacy-focused Chrome extension that summarizes Gmail emails and drafts replies using Groq LLMs with client-side processing.
projects.impact: SHA-256 caching and FIFO rate-limiting reduced redundant LLM calls; exportable latency/throughput/token-usage metrics

projects.name: Web Gladiator
projects.description: Immersive 3D first-person combat game with dynamic day-night cycle, intelligent enemy AI, multiple weapon systems, and power-ups.
projects.impact: Optimized Three.js rendering and React state management for smooth gameplay; deployed live on Vercel

projects.name: HostelGrid
projects.description: Complete hostel management system with student, room, and fee management, complaint tracking, and role-based access control.
projects.impact: Full admin dashboard with key metrics; deployed live on Render

projects.name: PDF Knowledge Assistant
projects.description: Intelligent chatbot enabling natural language queries on uploaded PDFs using embeddings, vector similarity search, and Gemini AI.
projects.impact: Context-aware responses with conversation memory and source references

projects.name: Heart Rate Monitor & Analysis
projects.description: Arduino-based heart rate monitoring system with real-time visualization and AI-powered medical analysis.
projects.impact: Data filtering pipeline improved signal accuracy; generated detailed AI health assessments

leadership.org: ADGVIT – Advanced Developers Group, VIT Vellore
highlights: Secured McDonald's as sponsor for Riviera 2026
Led sponsorship strategy for iOS Fusion 7.0 and 8.0
Coordinated keynote outreach for Yantra 2025 and Yantra 2026
